summary: Frontend-only review of PortPassLH Expo mobile app consuming an external FastAPI backend. Verified login screen UI/UX, external backend reachability via curl + pytest, source-code review of auth/api/location/permissions, and testID coverage. Login screen renders perfectly with all expected branding (PortPassLH, hero image, 'Se connecter avec Google', 'Accès réservé aux utilisateurs autorisés', 'CONNEXION SÉCURISÉE', 'Port du Havre'); zero console errors; unauthenticated user is correctly NOT redirected to (tabs). External backend endpoints (/api/works, /api/stats, /api/history, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/session) all respond as expected. Authenticated tabs (Map/Stats/History) cannot be reached by automated test because Emergent Google OAuth requires interactive consent — these are marked 'manual verification required' as instructed.

issues: No issues. Touch target for Google button is 327x56 (>=44pt). Hero contrast is good (rgba(5,10,17,0.85) overlay on dark port image).

react_native_issues.issue: Metro warns about expected versions: expo-location@55.1.9 vs ~19.0.8, expo-notifications@55.0.22 vs ~0.32.17, expo-secure-store@55.0.13 vs ~15.0.8, expo-speech@55.0.13 vs ~14.0.8, react-native-maps@1.27.2 vs 1.20.1. App still bundles & runs cleanly. Per project rules, accept package.json versions as source of truth — flagging only for awareness.
Bundler logs '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' originating from FAB/sheet styles in app/(tabs)/index.tsx. Cosmetic only on web; native still uses shadow* correctly.
Bundler logs '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' Expected; user requested LOCAL notifications only (no push). No action required.

code_review_findings.src/api.ts: OK — uses expo-secure-store (not AsyncStorage/localStorage); attaches 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request when token exists; reads BASE_URL from process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_PORTPASS_BACKEND_URL with no fallback; throws on non-2xx. exchangeSession() correctly POSTs {session_id} to /api/auth/session and parses session_token | access_token | token | Set-Cookie session_token.
code_review_findings.src/AuthContext.tsx: OK — no hardcoded URLs/redirects; uses WebBrowser.openAuthSessionAsync(`https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=${encodeURIComponent(BACKEND_URL+'/auth/callback')}`); parses session_id from URL fragment after '#'; persists token via setToken (SecureStore); refreshes user via getMe(); signOut clears token + calls logoutApi.
code_review_findings.app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx: OK — `if (!user) return <Redirect href="/" />` correctly gates tabs; tabBarButtonTestID set for tab-map/tab-stats/tab-history; permissions requested when user is authenticated.
code_review_findings.src/location.ts: OK — Haversine implementation matches reference formula (R=6371000 m); thresholdForMode returns 1000 for voiture, 2000 for camion as required; triggerProximityAlert short-circuits on 'ouvert' status; fires Haptics.notificationAsync(Warning) + Notifications.scheduleNotificationAsync({trigger:null}) + Speech.speak with language:'fr-FR'.
code_review_findings.app.json: OK — iOS NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription + NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription set in French; Android permissions ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION, VIBRATE, POST_NOTIFICATIONS declared; expo-location and expo-notifications plugins configured; expo-secure-store plugin declared. UIBackgroundModes:[location] declared.
code_review_findings.testIDs: All required testIDs present in source: auth-screen, auth-google-btn, auth-error, auth-loading, tab-map, tab-stats, tab-history (via tabBarButtonTestID), map-screen, map-view, marker-${w.id}, mode-voiture, mode-camion, locate-btn, logout-btn, work-sheet, sheet-close, stats-screen, stat-total, stat-open, stat-closing, stat-soon, stat-closed, stat-events-24h, history-screen, history-row-${id}.
code_review_findings.MapView.web.tsx: Stub renders informative placeholder on web (per agent_to_agent_context_note — not a bug). Native uses react-native-maps via MapView.native.tsx.

external_backend_smoke.GET /api/stats: 200, {total_works:15, open_count:13, closing_count:0, soon_count:0, closed_count:2, total_events_24h:35, last_haropa_sync} ✓

frontend_ui_smoke.google_button_click: did not crash; no auth.emergentagent.com network request observed because expo-web-browser on web platform opens a popup that Playwright's request listener does not intercept — this is expected, not a bug. On real iOS/Android devices openAuthSessionAsync opens a SafariViewController/Custom Tab pointing to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<backend>/auth/callback as coded.

manual_verification_required: End-to-end Google OAuth from Mrxxdoxdoxx@gmail.com (interactive consent + redirect to /auth/callback#session_id=...).
Map screen with native react-native-maps (web shows stub by design).
Proximity alert: vibration + local notification + French TTS when within 1000m (voiture) / 2000m (camion) of a non-'ouvert' work.
Vehicle mode toggle live behaviour on map.
Stats and History screens populated post-login (data flow verified at API layer).
action_items: OPTIONAL: Address Expo SDK package version warnings if/when stable (expo-location, expo-notifications, expo-secure-store, expo-speech, react-native-maps). Per project rules package.json is source of truth — no action required if main agent intentionally pinned newer versions.
OPTIONAL: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow on web variant or wrap with Platform.select to silence the deprecation log.
critical_code_review_comments: All auth tokens stored in expo-secure-store (TOKEN_KEY='portpass_session_token'); never written to AsyncStorage or localStorage. ✓
No hardcoded backend URL or redirect — strictly EXPO_PUBLIC_PORTPASS_BACKEND_URL. ✓
Proximity alerts skip status='ouvert' as required. ✓
Bearer token attached on all authenticated requests via central request() helper. ✓
Auth provider redirect on null user covers gating from (tabs)/_layout.tsx. ✓

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login screen + code review; authenticated tabs require manual Google sign-in)

seed_data_creation: None. External backend is shared and read-only for this test pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a pure frontend consumer of external backend at https://eb4c5836-043c-4dd0-9b6c-abf3c914bec2.preview.emergentagent.com. /app/backend is intentionally a placeholder — do NOT add tests there. Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_external_portpass_backend.py for backend regressions. To test authenticated flows, log in interactively as Mrxxdoxdoxx@gmail.com on a real device or in a non-headless browser; the web preview's MapView is a placeholder by design (MapView.web.tsx). All required testIDs are wired and were confirmed in source.
